formula.value: hello im math techear lets leanr math togetherr!
wow! youre actually so goodo, lets leern more type your adress here

i feel empty alot and i dont no why every day feels the same and im geting more tierd i try to smile around pepol but inside i feel broken somtimes i dont wana talk or leave my room at all music helps me a little but not for long
my mind is always loud and i cant stop overthinking at nite i stay awake and stare at the ceiling for ours i miss how happy i used to be before all this now even small things feel hard to do i act normal but deep inside im not okay
some days i feel numb and some days i just wana cry i feel lonely even when im around other pepol i wish someone could understand what im feeling im trying my best but it gets hard alot still i hope maybe one day things will feel lighter again
